title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Rising Conflict
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #12, Franky, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Countless men have sought after this item!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All the way from Fishman Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's real!! A real young mermaid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right! We'll take her back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's a mermaid!! They're selling a mermaid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ... man, we didn't stand a chance....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ... th... the whole audience is speechless!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Then... we'll find the key somehow....!!
